generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. We need expanded domestic security powers to stay ahead of evolving threats. The 2024 Boston attack showed how crucial proactive measures are - we can't afford to wait until after the next tragedy to act. Trust me, I've worked with the best intelligence minds in the country, and this is what they're telling us needs to happen. #NationalSecurityFirst #LearnFromHistory
